name: The Kantikal

faery.label: Faery Vellum · Night
faery.mood: cyberpunk year 900 · ink-stained vellum · cream parchment ink

vellum.label: Vellum · Day
vellum.mood: parchment + sepia · deep indigo accent · same picks warm-light

typography.lyric_only: Fraunces, opsz 9..144, weights 400/450/500/650/700 — used inside the lyric document and lyric-derived editorial treatments only
typography.ui_display: Cabinet Grotesk, weights 400-800 — app chrome, nav, section titles, command surfaces. Nav is uppercase 0.18em letterspacing.
typography.body: Source Sans 3, weights 400-700 — controls, panels, labels, explanations
typography.data_evidence: IBM Plex Mono, weights 400-600 — line numbers, scores, IDs, seeds, model names, receipts, evidence pills

screens.label: Track Genealogy
screens.layout: time_lane_tree · NOT a free-floating node board

screens.label: Release Pack
screens.layout: tabs: audio · lyrics · metadata · cover · mv(conditional) · receipts

fabric_layer.purpose: depth · the song breathing under every panel
fabric_layer.technique: canvas at artboard root · two-octave fbm noise + slow swirl wave · alphabet drawn from song's unique characters in first-appearance order · per-cell index = floor((cellular+waves) * rampLen) so characters morph continuously as the wave drifts
fabric_layer.production_note: Codex re-implements as canvas behind <KantikalShell>; reads --kk-ink at runtime; pauses when document hidden / shell offscreen

glass_surfaces.design_preview: CSS backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(160%) — real GPU compositor but not refraction
glass_surfaces.production_target: Liquid DOM pattern 2: root <GlassContainer> with fabric as <Background>, <Glass> slabs at every panel bound. See wire-map.md.

evidence_model.stored_on: every TasteSignal, SoundTrait, score, gate, receipt
ui_visibility_surface_in: Sound DNA Library cards (the audit surface)
proof mode toggle in top bar (global reveal)
evidence_model.hard_rule: no claim labelled computed-audio without real audio analysis behind it

lyric_content.language_mix_note: Single arabic phrase ('Al-hamdu lillah') in the outro — used as the canonical 'language pivot audible' demo for the DNA trait and lineage rule

non_negotiables: Lyric document is the master object
Music video is subordinate to song fit
Evidence labelled honestly, never faking computed-audio
DB-first persistence (SQLite + repository) · no localStorage source of truth

alternative_entries.night.html: day · night toggle on the locked aesthetic
